productDisplayName: BIBA Women Solid Navy Blue Kurta
description: Composition Navy blue kurta made of lightweight 100% cotton, has a small collar, full front opening with buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, embellishment on front, short vents at sides and curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron A man's shirt has been reinvented as a kurta from biba – complete with button cuffs and curved hem, but with lovely feminine details. This kurta is made of soft lightweight cotton which will keep you cool in warm weather. Wear this over leggings or over jeans depending on the occasion. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
